title: 🤔Permutations: How teams qualify for knockouts
summary: Teams can secure World Cup knockout qualification before the group stage ends based on various permutations of results. The article explains which teams are advancing and which are at risk of early elimination.
content: Who can secure qualification before the group stage ends, and whose World Cup dreams could be shattered? Here's what you need to know.

zh.title: 排列组合：球队如何晋级淘汰赛
zh.summary: 球队可以根据比赛结果的各种排列组合在小组赛结束前确保晋级世界杯淘汰赛。该文章解释了哪些球队正在推进，哪些球队面临早期淘汰的风险。

title: Cape Verde cause latest WC shock, deny Uruguay
summary: Cape Verde continues to deliver shock results at its inaugural World Cup, denying Uruguay victory in another surprise performance.
content: Cape Verde's magical start to its first World Cup isn't over. It might just be getting started.

zh.title: 佛得角创造最新世界杯冷门，挡住乌拉圭
zh.summary: 佛得角在其首届世界杯上继续带来冷门结果，在又一次令人惊讶的表现中阻止乌拉圭获胜。

title: Salah leads rally as Egypt get first-ever WC win
summary: Mohamed Salah scored the go-ahead goal as Egypt defeated New Zealand 3-1 to secure the nation's first-ever World Cup victory. The win marks a historic achievement for the African nation at the tournament.
content: Mohamed Salah scored the go-ahead goal, and Egypt went on to defeat New Zealand 3-1 on Sunday night and secure a first-ever World Cup win.

zh.title: 萨拉赫带头助威，埃及获得首次世界杯胜利
zh.summary: 穆罕默德·萨拉赫打进制胜球，埃及3:1击败新西兰，确保该国首次世界杯胜利。这场胜利标志着这个非洲国家在赛事上的历史性成就。

title: Iran played 'beautiful game' in worst conditions
summary: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei praised his team's performance in a 0-0 draw with Belgium despite challenging conditions at SoFi Stadium on Sunday.
content: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei said his team played a "beautiful game" under the "worst possible conditions" in their 0-0 draw with Belgium at SoFi Stadium on Sunday.

zh.title: 伊朗在最恶劣的条件下踢出"漂亮足球"
zh.summary: 伊朗主教练阿米尔·加勒诺埃赞扬了他的球队在周日索菲体育场恶劣条件下与比利时打平的表现。

title: Iraq's plan to stop Mbappé? Ask to play 3 keepers
summary: Iraq coach Graham Arnold proposed an unconventional three-goalkeeper strategy to contain France's star player Kylian Mbappé ahead of their World Cup match.
content: Iraq coach Graham Arnold -- tasked with slowing down Kylian Mbappé and the 2022 World Cup finalists France on Monday -- had an idea that might have worked.

zh.title: 伊拉克阻挡姆巴佩的计划？要求出场3名门将
zh.summary: 伊拉克主教练格雷厄姆·阿诺德提出了一项非常规的三门将战术，以在即将进行的世界杯比赛中限制法国巨星基利安·姆巴佩。

title: Argentina's Scaloni: Water breaks fragment game
summary: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni criticized the newly implemented hydration breaks at the World Cup, arguing they disrupt match flow and provide an unfair advantage to less skilled teams.
content: Argentina national team manager Lionel Scaloni said the newly implemented hydration breaks at the FIFA World Cup make for a fragmented match, giving the weaker side an advantage for the second part of the half.

zh.title: 阿根廷斯卡洛尼：补水休息打破比赛节奏
zh.summary: 阿根廷主教练莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼批评了世界杯新实施的补水暂停措施，认为它们破坏了比赛流畅性，对技术较弱的球队造成不公平的优势。

title: Conceição: No obligation to pass ball to Ronaldo
summary: Portugal's Francisco Conceição rejected suggestions that his team feels obligated to constantly direct play toward Cristiano Ronaldo during World Cup matches.
content: Portugal's Francisco Conceição on Sunday rejected suggestions that the team feels compelled to constantly look for Cristiano Ronaldo on the pitch at this 2026 FIFA World Cup.

zh.title: 孔塞桑：无义务必须传球给罗纳尔多
zh.summary: 葡萄牙的弗朗西斯科·孔塞桑拒绝了他的球队在世界杯比赛中有义务经常向克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多传球的说法。

title: Iran deny militant tried to board team plane
summary: U.S. Homeland Security officials reported that an individual with ties to Iran's Revolutionary Guard attempted to board the Iranian national team's flight to Los Angeles for their World Cup match against Belgium. Iran denied the incident occurred.
content: U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin told Fox News that an individual with direct ties to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) tried to board the Iran team's flight to Los Angeles from Mexico for Sunday's World Cup match vs. Belgium.

zh.title: 伊朗否认武装分子试图登上球队飞机
zh.summary: 美国国土安全官员报告称，一个与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队有关联的个人试图登上伊朗国家足球队飞往洛杉矶参加世界杯对阵比利时比赛的航班。伊朗否认了这一事件的发生。

title: Garcia out as Ajax coach after turbulent season
summary: Ajax terminated coach Oscar Garcia following a turbulent season in which the Dutch club finished fifth in the Eredivisie league standings.
content: Ajax parted ways with coach Oscar Garcia on Sunday after a turbulent season in which the Dutch club finished fifth in Eredivisie.

zh.title: 加西亚在波澜起伏的赛季后不再担任阿贾克斯主教练

title: USMNT's World Cup success brings dilemma: Rotate t...
summary: The USMNT has secured its place in the World Cup knockout stage, leaving coaches to decide whether to rotate players in their final group match or maintain their winning lineup.
content: The USMNT has clinched a spot in the World Cup knockouts, so should the team rotate in its final Group D match or stay consistent?

title: How Freeman's Pro Bowl dad helped him live his Wor...
summary: Freeman's father, a former Pro Bowl athlete, provided guidance that helped his son achieve World Cup success. The family connection highlights the role of parental support in athletic achievement.

zh.summary: 弗里曼的父亲是前职业碗运动员，他提供的指导帮助儿子取得了世界杯成功。这个家庭联系突出了父母支持在体育成就中的重要作用。

title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG to compete with Man Uni...
summary: Paris Saint-Germain is competing with Manchester United to acquire West Ham winger Crysencio Summerville, marking the latest development in the transfer market this season.
content: Manchester United could face competition from Paris Saint-Germain as they try to sign West Ham United winger Crysencio Summerville. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼正在与曼联竞争以签下韦斯特汉姆边锋克里森西奥·萨默维尔，这是本赛季转会市场的最新发展。

title: World Cup Daily: Cape Verde stun again, Yamal shin...
summary: Spain dominated Saudi Arabia while Cape Verde delivered another upset victory, Belgium drew 0-0 with Iran, and Egypt secured a win over New Zealand in another eventful day of World Cup action.
content: Another day's worth of FIFA World Cup action is in the books, with Spain romping past Saudi Arabia, Belgium tying Iran, and Mohamed Salah's Egypt taking all three points from their clash with New Zealand.

zh.title: 世界杯日报：佛得角再次爆冷，亚马尔膝伤...
zh.summary: 西班牙主宰沙特阿拉伯，佛得角再次创造爆冷胜利，比利时与伊朗战平0-0，埃及战胜新西兰，又是世界杯激动人心的一天。

title: World Cup 'smart' ball is a game changer. Just don...
summary: The 2026 World Cup features the Trionda, an advanced soccer ball embedded with chips and sensors designed to improve game accuracy and fairness. The innovative technology has received positive reception so far.
content: Everything in soccer can always be improved -- even the humble game ball. The 2026 World Cup has the Trionda, filled with chips and sensors, and so far, it's been well-received.

zh.title: 世界杯"智能"足球改变游戏规则
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯采用特里翁达足球，这是一种内置芯片和传感器的先进足球，旨在提高比赛的准确性和公平性。这项创新技术迄今为止获得了积极反馈。

title: 'Every team does it': How World Cup sides thwart o...
summary: World Cup teams employ various tactics and strategies to prevent opponents from gathering intelligence on their plans and tactics. Espionage and counter-espionage are common practices across international soccer competition.
content: Soccer is full of people who are either (A) spying on someone; (B) actively worried that someone is spying on them; or (C) both. So how do they stop it?

zh.title: '每支球队都这样做'：世界杯球队如何阻止对手...
zh.summary: 世界杯球队采用各种战术和策略来阻止对手收集关于其计划和战术的情报。间谍和反间谍是国际足球竞争中的常见做法。

title: Unbeaten Iran will go down in history - Ghalenoei
summary: Iran's coach believes the team's unbeaten World Cup record will be historically significant despite facing disruptions before and during the tournament.
content: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei believes his side's unbeaten start to the World Cup will be talked about for years to come given the disruption they have faced before and during the tournament.

zh.title: 不败的伊朗将载入史册 - 盖莱诺埃
zh.summary: 伊朗教练认为，尽管球队在世界杯前和期间面临中断，但其不败记录将具有历史意义。

title: Saka trains with England squad before Ghana match
summary: England forward Bukayo Saka has resumed training with the squad, providing a fitness boost ahead of their second World Cup match against Ghana.
content: Bukayo Saka trains with the England squad to provide a fitness boost to Thomas Tuchel before their second World Cup match against Ghana.

zh.title: 萨卡在加纳比赛前与英格兰队一起训练
zh.summary: 英格兰前锋布卡约·萨卡已恢复与球队的训练，为他们即将进行的第二场世界杯对手加纳的比赛提供了体能上的提升。
